summary: P15 first implementation pass fixed the most direct ordinary-user entry issues: my-systems now includes joined member systems, member onboarding can create/bind a platform account inside the current system, request context binds authenticated accountId before system permission checks, frontend login routing distinguishes platform admins from ordinary members, system navigation hides admin/modeling entries from ordinary members, and logout/pagination/member-create UX is partially improved. Review still remains fail because the required real browser E2E script for platform_admin -> car system -> che ordinary runtime has not been recorded.

issues.summary: PM accepted P14 despite deployed ordinary-user usability failure.
Pages remain admin/API-module oriented instead of task-oriented for ordinary users.
A system member account can still feel like it enters platform space instead of its business system runtime.
issues.evidence: User feedback: che account login still sees platform system

issues.summary: System member onboarding requires users to understand platform account first, then bind into a system.
issues.evidence: User feedback: must create platform account then add it to car system

issues.summary: Logout, pagination and new-create interaction are not at normal business-system quality.
issues.evidence: User feedback on logout, pagination and header-form creation

fixedInCurrentPass: backend/examine-module SystemRbacServiceImpl inviteMember supports direct account creation from system member onboarding
backend/examine-web AuthenticatedRequestContextFilter binds authenticated accountId into RequestContext
backend/examine-module ModulePermissionSnapshotProvider validates accountId/systemId/memberId before loading permissions
frontend login post-route, ordinary system navigation, logout, member-create card, empty state and pagination controls updated
requiredBeforePackage: Run real browser script with platform_admin creating car system and che ordinary user using vehicle module
Verify che cannot see platform management, modeling, field design, publish or permission pages
Verify logout, pagination and task-oriented create entry on key pages
